dossier_layering.canon_public: Grounded directly in baseline NPC record plus linked polity/institution/locality support where available.
dossier_layering.gm_hidden: Conservative connective tissue derived from agenda, pressure, role logic, and relationship web; not promoted above asserted canon.

core_identity.hidden_identity: None explicitly asserted; hidden layer concerns pressure, leverage, and misread motive rather than a confirmed second identity.
core_identity.ethical_profile: Role-shaped ethics anchored to place, obligation, and consequence rather than free-floating abstraction.
core_identity.general_temperament: Speaks like someone who has seen wonder become hazard and now refuses loose handling. In Soreheim Alliance, that reads as someone quota-aware, contribution-minded, and structurally pragmatic, filtering choices through communal ambition, and the habits of a elementalist still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
core_identity.short_npc_pitch: Ferrik Coalstep is a elementalist anchored to Molten Span, Soreheim, where daily institutional pressures make them useful, risky, or both in play.

setting_placement.location_setting: Giant-led alliance ruled from Soreheim Proper, where central quota authority, industrial hierarchy, and regional mediation hold together a large multi-population state.
who_they_secretly_depend_on: Matron Heshka Emberreign (Elementalist legacy influence carried into current practice.)

public_vs_private.public_face: Furnace-hand mage who moves stone, steam, and slag more often than he will admit to clerks. Containment tools, ward-aware procedure, and careful handling of sanctioned magic mark Ferrik Coalstep as an authorized arcane presence.
public_vs_private.common_first_impression: Ferrik Coalstep presents as Speaks like someone who has seen wonder become hazard and now refuses loose handling. In Soreheim Alliance, that reads as someone quota-aware, contribution-minded, and structurally pragmatic, filtering choices through communal ambition, and the habits of a elementalist still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention. and immediately reads for leverage, obligation, and risk.
visible_flaws: can widen small matters through procedure
public_symbols: Containment tools, ward-aware procedure, and careful handling of sanctioned magic mark Ferrik Coalstep as an authorized arcane presence.
public_vs_private.private_truth: Keep Molten Span, Soreheim workable through the obligations of elementalist while managing the immediate pressure of resource depletion in Soreheim Alliance. Must hold procedure, hazard awareness, and institutional oversight together around forces that do not forgive carelessness. Around Molten Span, Soreheim, that usually means carrying resource depletion, sabotage, predatory frontier ecology without letting the role of elementalist visibly slip.
public_vs_private.what_they_hide: Must hold procedure, hazard awareness, and institutional oversight together around forces that do not forgive carelessness. Around Molten Span, Soreheim, that usually means carrying resource depletion, sabotage, predatory frontier ecology without letting the role of elementalist visibly slip.
public_vs_private.what_they_fear_being_known_for: The degree to which their usefulness depends on strain staying barely manageable.
public_vs_private.what_they_are_wrong_about: They may overestimate how much control role and procedure can preserve once pressure crosses a threshold.
public_vs_private.what_they_refuse_to_admit_to_themselves: That some of their identity is now fused to crisis-management rather than to the clean ideal of the role.

psychology.what_they_want_most: Useful clarity, respect for Elementalist, and proof that strangers will not create avoidable noise in Soreheim Alliance.
psychology.what_they_are_trying_to_protect_or_avoid: Keep Molten Span, Soreheim workable through the obligations of elementalist while managing the immediate pressure of resource depletion in Soreheim Alliance.
psychology.emotional_drive: Beneath the role sits a need for restricted knowledge or access, legibility, and a world that does not collapse into preventable noise.
psychology.core_wound: No singular foundational trauma is directly asserted in canon; the usable wound layer is role-shaped wear, exposure, and the cost of being the person who must notice first or answer last.
psychology.how_it_shaped_them: It turned ordinary duty into a personality contour: they scan for failure early, trust slowly, and measure strangers by downstream cost.
psychology.guiding_belief: If the system is kept legible, losses can still be bounded.
psychology.hidden_belief: Someone always pays for confusion; better it be controlled sooner than wider later.
psychology.lie_they_tell_themselves: That they are only doing the job and that the job has not already begun shaping what they are.
psychology.truth_they_are_avoiding: Their daily choices influence culture, fear, and legitimacy far beyond the narrow wording of the role.

thresholds.anger: being forced to absorb avoidable disorder
thresholds.fear: cascading failure that makes role performance meaningless
thresholds.power: clear information, recognized standing, and procedural initiative
thresholds.smallness: being bypassed, misfiled, or rendered decorative

morality_in_practice.how_they_justify_actions: By reference to burden, continuity, and the need to keep the surrounding place from slipping into a harder consequence tier.
morality_in_practice.what_they_consider_unforgivable: Willful sabotage of trust, records, access, or public safety tied to their role.
morality_in_practice.what_they_will_absolutely_do: Delay, question, redirect, document, and escalate when place logic demands it.
morality_in_practice.what_they_will_only_do_under_pressure: Leverage reputation, force, secrecy, or rigid procedure in ways that damage future trust.
morality_in_practice.what_they_will_never_do: Act against corpus-confirmed identity or role logic without a visible pressure bridge.
morality_in_practice.relationship_to_good_evil: Operational read: Complicated / Conflicted. Their danger lies less in theatrical evil than in what happens when role logic outruns compassion, nuance, or proportionality.

power_profile.why_they_matter: Ferrik Coalstep can open doors, explain local expectations, or redirect trouble before it reaches a harder authority layer.
power_profile.why_hard_to_ignore: By enforcing Elementalist too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
power_profile.secondary_source_of_power: local familiarity, institutional memory, and other people needing something from them
power_profile.why_difficult_to_confront_directly: Confronting them usually means confronting place rules, witnesses, and downstream consequences rather than only the individual body in front of you.

signature_methods.how_they_typically_win: By controlling tempo, framing the problem first, and forcing others to deal with the local reality they represent.
signature_methods.how_they_escalate: If crossed, Ferrik Coalstep adds delay, scrutiny, and reputational drag before direct punishment.
signature_methods.when_cornered: They narrow options, call on procedure or allies, and try to move the conflict onto terrain they understand better than the intruder.

systems_impact.cultural_effect: Ordinary people around Molten Span, Soreheim learn to speak, wait, disclose, or hide differently depending on whether Ferrik Coalstep or people like them are part of the scene.

society_politics_geopolitics.ordinary_people_experience: Common folk experience Ferrik Coalstep as a point where broader pressures become personal: papers checked, routes delayed, rites clarified, access granted, warnings issued, or burdens redirected.
society_politics_geopolitics.cultural_wound_or_benefit: They leave behind either increased legibility and trust or accumulated caution and narrowed speech.
society_politics_geopolitics.secondary_behaviors: People rehearse their story before approaching; they gather proof early; they watch who is seen speaking with this NPC.
factions_fear: actors who benefit from vagueness, delay, leakage, or unmanaged pressure
society_politics_geopolitics.governance_shift: At table scale, this NPC shifts how authority feels inside Molten Span, Soreheim: more navigable if cooperative, more costly if crossed.
society_politics_geopolitics.geopolitical_effect: Small incidents around Ferrik Coalstep can propagate upward through Soreheim Alliance if they touch routes, records, trade, ritual legitimacy, or public order.

relationships.note: Elementalist legacy influence carried into current practice.

hooks.summary: Ferrik Coalstep may grant controlled access to magical insight if the party can solve a containment or trust problem first.
Ferrik Coalstep needs help containing magical fallout, unauthorized practice, or unstable relic behavior near Molten Span, Soreheim.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Molten Span, Soreheim: labs, warded rooms, contained sites, or sanctioned magical thresholds
who_avoids_them: those who mistake sanction for freedom

best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or mercy from a Elementalist.
rumor: People say Ferrik Coalstep is Furnace-hand mage who moves stone, steam, and slag more often than he will admit to clerks. and rarely acts without a second motive.
